title: RH17 5AL, Southern Water Services Limited: environmental permit issued – EPR/WP3695HW/V006
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:    Operator name: Southern Water Services Limited   Installation name: Goddards Green Sludge Treatment Centre   Permit number: EPR/WP3695HW/V006   "
